chunks.title: Wisdom and Folly in Speech
chunks.reason: A collection of proverbs contrasting the speech and behavior of fools with sound wisdom.

chunks.title: Strength in God and the Human Spirit
chunks.reason: Verses on the security of Yahweh's name, the delusion of wealth, and the endurance of the spirit.

chunks.title: The Pursuit and Power of Knowledge
chunks.reason: A logical progression on acquiring knowledge, the influence of gifts, legal disputes, and the fruit of speech.

chunks.title: Life, Marriage, and Friendship
chunks.reason: Concluding proverbs on the power of the tongue, the blessing of a wife, social dynamics, and true friendship.
